Step 2: SHOCK — Italian sovereign crisis hits UniCredit
+ JPM restricts dollar repo to European banks
+ UBS marks down European sovereign bond holdings
JPM restricts dollar repo to DBK: -60% → €7.2bn withdrawn (€7.20bn)
JPM restricts dollar repo to BNP: -60% → €6.0bn withdrawn (€6.00bn)
JPM restricts dollar repo to UCG: -60% → €3.0bn withdrawn (€3.00bn)
JPM restricts dollar repo to UBS: -60% → €9.0bn withdrawn (€9.00bn)
JPM restricts dollar repo to DBK: -60% → €4.8bn withdrawn (€4.80bn)
JPM restricts dollar repo to BNP: -60% → €3.6bn withdrawn (€3.60bn)
JPM restricts dollar repo to UBS: -60% → €4.2bn withdrawn (€4.20bn)
UBS marks down European sovereign bonds 5.0% (guilt-by-association)
